task_params.subject: Invitation: Studio Hours Workshop
body_points: invite colleagues to an internal creative workshop called Studio Hours
frame it as a relaxed drop-in experience rather than a formal meeting
mention collage, sketching, and idea pinning stations
say no art experience is needed and curiosity is enough
encourage people to stop by, look around, and contribute a small idea
keep the tone warm, welcoming, and a little gallery-opening inspired
